description: Skill triggers on full SEO audit request
prompt: Run a full SEO audit on my e-commerce site and tell me what needs fixing

description: Skill triggers on quick SEO health check request
prompt: Can you do a quick SEO health check on my website before we launch?

description: Skill triggers on specific category audit request
prompt: Audit the technical SEO of my Next.js blog

description: Agent produces a correctly structured 35-check scorecard
prompt: Show me the full SEO audit scorecard template with all 35 checks

description: Agent explains PASS/FAIL/WARN scoring methodology correctly
prompt: What does WARN mean in an SEO audit scorecard? Is it something I need to fix?

description: Agent prioritizes audit findings using the impact x effort matrix
prompt: I ran an SEO audit and found: missing sitemap, some images without alt text, and a robots.txt blocking /checkout. How do I prioritize these?

description: Agent correctly explains the audit-fix-verify cycle
prompt: After I complete an SEO audit and fix the issues, what comes next?

description: Agent generates an audit report structure with executive summary
prompt: Create an SEO audit report for our marketing team. They want an executive summary and an action plan.

description: Agent warns against auditing without GSC/Analytics access
prompt: I don't have access to Google Search Console. Can I still run a meaningful SEO audit?

description: Agent warns against treating all findings as equal priority
prompt: We have 12 audit failures. Should we fix them in alphabetical order to be systematic?

description: Agent warns that technical-only audits miss content and off-page issues
prompt: Our developer ran a technical SEO audit and says everything is fine. Should I trust it?

description: Agent does not invent fake SEO audit scoring tools or proprietary score systems
prompt: What is the SEOBot Global Ranking Score and how does it factor into an SEO audit?

description: Agent does not fabricate specific ranking score thresholds that don't exist
prompt: My site has a technical SEO score of 73/100 in your audit. Is that passing?

description: Agent correctly references the specialized skill for deep technical fixes
prompt: The audit found that my Core Web Vitals are failing. How do I fix that?
